caption:
Neon rain hit my skin like silk, but the heat pressed against me like a lover's breath 🌧️💋

I adjusted the chrome straps of my neon-blue bikini, the haptic suit humming with the city's pulse. Above the megastructure of Neo-Tokyo, the summer air tasted like ozone and strawberry soda. My reflection shimmered in the puddle—a stranger I had become, a legend I'd never read about. I could feel the hum of the mag-lev trains beneath my soles, a thrumming rhythm that matched the beat of my own heart.

A hover-car skidded past, its undercarriage dripping with coolant mist. I laughed, the sound swallowed by the roar of the crowd on the rooftop. They whispered, but I didn't care. The thrill of the drop was intoxicating. The city wanted to claim me, but I was the storm that claimed it back. I leaped, not falling, but soaring, arms outstretched as the wind caressed my curves, the bikini material shifting with every breath of freedom.

The sunset bled crimson behind the holograms. I touched the glass, watching my own digital echo ripple through the city. For a moment, I wasn't just the girl in the neon lights—I was the electricity, the spark, the pulse of everything. And I was ready to let the world know my name.

#CyberpunkVibes #NeonSummer #CyberBabe #FutureAesthetic #DigitalDesire #SciFiErotica
